member.name: M:GTA.Script.GetRelativeFilePath(System.String)
member.summary:
Gets the full file path for a file relative to this
. e.g: GetRelativeFilePath("ScriptFiles\texture1.png") may return "C:\Program Files\Rockstar Games\Grand Theft Auto V\scripts\ScriptFiles\texture1.png" .
member.param:
The file path relative to the location of this
.
